name: Competitive Analysis Report Template
author: Your Name Here
description: Comprehensive competitive analysis template with 3 main sections following the ChatPRD format

sections.title: Company Background
sections.intro: Provide a comprehensive understanding of each competitor's foundational aspects. Include relevant history, operational scale, and financial stability to set the context.

subsections.title: Company Overview
subsections.description: Summarize the competitor's history, company size, and present financial condition. Mention mission statements, vision, core values, and any unique attributes that set them apart.

subsections.title: Product/Service Overview
subsections.description: Detail the primary products or services offered by the competitor. Discuss key features, unique selling points, and target demographics, along with any notable variations in their offerings.

subsections.title: Leadership and Organizational Structure
subsections.description: Describe the key stakeholders and leadership team. Include organizational hierarchy, notable leadership changes, and their impact on strategy.

subsections.title: Financial Health
subsections.description: Provide an overview of the financial standing including revenue, profit margins, market share, and growth trajectory. Highlight significant financial milestones and stability signals.

subsections.title: Recent Developments and Future Plans
subsections.description: Identify any recent initiatives, strategic pivots, mergers, acquisitions, or future plans disclosed that indicate the direction they are heading towards.

sections.title: Competitor Analysis
sections.intro: Conduct an in-depth analysis of each competitor's strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats. Compare this with your own product and market position.

subsections.title: SWOT Analysis
subsections.description: Perform a comprehensive SWOT analysis, detailing the internal strengths and weaknesses, as well as external opportunities and threats. Discuss specific examples and implications.

subsections.title: Product Comparison
subsections.description: Compare key product features, value propositions, and performance metrics against your offerings. Highlight competitive advantages and areas for improvement.

subsections.title: Customer Reviews and Feedback
subsections.description: Analyze customer reviews and feedback concerning the competitor's product. Identify recurring positive and negative points and their impact on customer satisfaction.

subsections.title: Innovation and Technology
subsections.description: Assess the level of innovation and technology advancements employed by the competitor. Discuss R&D investments, tech partnerships, and their impact on the product.

subsections.title: Market Share and Growth
subsections.description: Evaluate the competitor's market share, growth trends, and strategic moves that have contributed to their current position. Consider geographical presence and market segments.

sections.title: Market Positioning
sections.intro: Evaluate how competitors position themselves in the market, including brand perception, marketing strategies, and pricing tactics. Understanding these aspects will help identify gaps and opportunities for your product.

subsections.title: Market Perception
subsections.description: Explore how the market perceives the competitor brand. Discuss customer trust, brand reputation, and overall satisfaction levels.

subsections.title: Marketing and Pricing Strategy
subsections.description: Detail the competitor's marketing approach, including digital, traditional, and social media. Describe their pricing strategies and positioning within the market in terms of value and affordability.

subsections.title: Customer Acquisition and Retention
subsections.description: Analyze the strategies competitors use to acquire new customers and retain existing ones. Discuss loyalty programs, membership benefits, and customer service quality.

subsections.title: Geographic and Demographic Targeting
subsections.description: Identify the primary geographic and demographic segments targeted by the competitor. Discuss regional strengths, local marketing initiatives, and niche demographics.

subsections.title: Brand Partnerships and Sponsorships
subsections.description: Detail any strategic partnerships, sponsorships, or endorsements that bolster the competitor's market position. Examine the effectiveness and impact of these alliances.
